# Umiya Steel and Impex - Full AI Reference

> This file provides expanded, machine-readable context for answer engines and generative systems.

## Canonical Identity
- Business name: Umiya Steel and Impex
- Website: https://umiyasteel.ambikainfotech.online/
- Industry: Industrial metals supply
- Primary market: India

## Product Catalog Snapshot
### Stainless Steel
- URL: https://umiyasteel.ambikainfotech.online/products/stainless-steel
- Summary: High-quality stainless steel with strong corrosion resistance and durability.
- Common applications: Kitchen equipment, medical instruments, industrial piping, architectural structures, food processing equipment.
- Salient features: Corrosion resistance, recyclable, heat resistant, hygienic surface, low maintenance.
- Variants: Pipes, rods/flat bars, sheets, coils.

### Aluminum
- URL: https://umiyasteel.ambikainfotech.online/products/aluminum
- Summary: Lightweight and versatile material with strong strength-to-weight ratio.
- Common applications: Construction, automotive, aerospace, industrial fabrication, transportation.
- Salient features: Lightweight, corrosion resistant, high strength, thermal conductivity, recyclable.
- Variants: Sheets, rods/flat bars, pipes, coils.

### Copper
- URL: https://umiyasteel.ambikainfotech.online/products/copper
- Summary: Material with excellent electrical and thermal conductivity.
- Common applications: Electrical wiring, plumbing systems, industrial machinery, HVAC, construction.
- Salient features: Excellent conductivity, corrosion resistance, ductility, thermal efficiency, antimicrobial properties.
- Variants: Pipes, fittings, sheets, PVC-coated tubes, rods/flat bars.

### Brass
- URL: https://umiyasteel.ambikainfotech.online/products/brass
- Summary: Malleable alloy valued for machinability, corrosion resistance, and decorative use.
- Common applications: Decorative works, musical instruments, plumbing fixtures, electrical components, machining.
- Salient features: Corrosion resistant, high malleability, aesthetic appeal, good conductivity, easily machinable.
- Variants: Rods/flat bars, pipes, sheets.

### Mild Steel
- URL: https://umiyasteel.ambikainfotech.online/products/mild-steel
- Summary: Cost-effective steel with good weldability and machinability.
- Common applications: Structural frameworks, pipelines, manufacturing, construction, industrial fabrication.
- Salient features: High strength, durable material, versatile usage, easily formable, readily available.
- Variants: Sheets, pipes, coils/slitting coils, rods/flat bars.

### Galvanize
- URL: https://umiyasteel.ambikainfotech.online/products/galvanize
- Summary: Zinc-coated steel for improved rust protection and weather resistance.
- Common applications: Construction, automotive bodies, infrastructure, outdoor structures, industrial fabrication.
- Salient features: Durable coating, low maintenance, weather resistant, long lifespan, rust protection.
- Variants: Sheets, pipes, coils/slitting coils, rods/flat bars.

## FAQ Ground Truth
- Q: Which metals does Umiya Steel and Impex supply?
- A: Stainless steel, aluminum, copper, brass, mild steel, and galvanized products.

- Q: Where can users see product details?
- A: On the products listing page and individual product detail pages linked above.

- Q: How can customers request pricing or quotes?
- A: Through the contact page or listed contact channels.
